title: Klinik Pergigian Suriani Kota Damansara
address: 14-A1, SEKSYEN 4, Jalan Camar 4/3, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Noor Syazwana Mat Islan
reviews.text: Senang dan mudah berurusan. Appointment dgn whatsapp saja. Staff dan doktor ok. Terang pon mudah faham.

reviews.name: Fauziah Hani
reviews.text: I dah sakit gigi few days but my regular dental asyik xkena timing for appointment. Sakit gigi malam, so google2 found this clinic yg thankfully open until 10pm. So cepat2 call around 9.15pm and they said okay boleh dtg. Dr Amal patiently listening to my backgrd story, kindly explain to me well on my options. Overall good experience 👍🏻

reviews.name: hanny 94
reviews.text: Hello, Klinik Suriani is very nice to visit. Really recommended!

reviews.name: Adam Danish
reviews.text: good 👍🏻

reviews.name: Kamalin Annuar
reviews.text: Honest review; saya pergi untuk scaling gigi pain level 1/10, ngilu 2/10 👍🏻 gigi bersih, dr akan consult apa yg perlu saya buat lepas hbs scaling. Klinik bersih, staff friendly. I would say bayar rm240 untuk newcomer scaling + polishing sangat berbaloi 🤗 ws klinik tanya je apa2 soalan staff akan reply 👍🏻 thank u!!!

description:
Klinik Pergigian Suriani Kota Damansara stands out as a specialized dental clinic dedicated to providing comprehensive oral healthcare in the vibrant community of Selangor. Offering an array of services ranging from routine check-ups to advanced dental procedures, this clinic ensures that every patient receives personalized care tailored to their needs.

Upon entering the facility, patients are greeted by a friendly staff who streamline appointments through convenient methods like WhatsApp. Feedback highlights the efficient service, with many noting how quickly their dental issues were addressed. As one satisfied patient mentioned, "I dah sakit gigi few days but my regular dental asyik xkena timing for appointment," illustrating the clinic's commitment to emergency care.

The clinic's central location within Kota Damansara enhances its accessibility, inviting residents to prioritize their oral health without extensive travel. With a dedication to both patient satisfaction and community wellness, Klinik Pergigian Suriani reinforces its role as a reliable cornerstone for the area’s dental health services.

title: Klinik Pergigian DentaLevant
address: S-01-08 EMPORIS GROUND FLOOR Persiaran Surian, Jalan Teknologi Seksyen 3, Taman Sains Selangor, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ah Ming
reviews.text: Great service & dentist experience! Will definitely recommend my friends & family

reviews.name: Ahmad Mubaraq Ahmad
reviews.text:
My 6-year-old has been seeing Dr. Nolan for his dental care, and he has always been comfortable during his visits. Dr. Nolan previously fitted him with 2 metal crowns, and more recently extracted 2 other decayed teeth.

The procedure went smoothly. He was able to go about his usual activities later without any significant discomfort, which was reassuring for us as parents.

We also appreciated that Dr. Nolan took the time to check in on our son’s healing progress after the procedure. Thank you for the care and attention provided.

reviews.name: Mohammad Salleh
reviews.text: Dr. Nolan was very helpful throughout my veneer treatment. He is a great dentist with a very positive and friendly attitude that made me feel comfortable during the entire process. I am very satisfied with the final result of my composite veneers, and they look fantastic. I would highly recommend Dr. Nolan to anyone looking for quality dental care.

reviews.name: mizanur rahman
reviews.text:
Dr Nolan and nurse Azila, great service and reassured me the correct appropriate treatment. Noticed an immediate differnce on my teeth. Great result

Friendly counter staff  by Shaza

street: S-01-08 EMPORIS GROUND FLOOR Persiaran Surian, Jalan Teknologi Seksyen 3, Taman Sains Selangor
description:
Klinik Pergigian DentaLevant distinguishes itself in Taman Sains Selangor with an unwavering commitment to patient-centered dental care. Located conveniently within the Emporis complex, this facility is easily accessible for residents and professionals alike, offering modern amenities that enhance the overall experience. Its focus on a calm and inviting environment ensures patients feel at ease, making each visit less daunting—especially for children.

The clinic's team, led by the experienced Dr. Nolan, emphasizes personalized treatment tailored to individual needs. Recent feedback highlights the welcoming atmosphere and comprehensive dental services, fostering strong relationships with families. “Great service & dental experience! Will definitely recommend,” shared a satisfied patient, reflecting the general sentiment of care and expertise provided.

DentaLevant's dedication to quality goes beyond standard treatments; its commitment is evident in every interaction. The clinic operates six days a week, ensuring flexibility for busy schedules, and stands ready to serve residents in a growing community committed to health and wellness. This attention to detail aligns perfectly with the facility’s ethos of promoting not just dental health but overall well-being.

description:

title: Klinik Pergigian Saidah
address: 16-2, Jalan 14/22, Seksyen 14, 46100 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Azhar Mohd
reviews.text: Worst services

reviews.name: esmee aniza mohamed
reviews.text:
I have been with klinik saidah for few years now. Always so upset to go to the dentist as almost all dentist I went to before are quiet scary as they are a bit harsh on my teeth.
I love coming here as doctor saidah and her colleagues are always treating my teeth nicely and I won't be having any painful experience here. Good also to bring children here.
I only do my scaling here as the doctors are so gentle. Just came here to do filling on my teeth and replace a composite tooth which doctor saidah made for me 3 years ago. However, sometimes hard to get appointment maybe up until 1 week... but you can request to walk in early if you are in pain.
I recommend this clinic as I know it is hard to find a good dentist nowadays.
You will have problem on parking better to take grabcar or ask somebody to drive you here.

reviews.name: Afanizam Badarudin
reviews.text: Sungguh puas hati dengan rawatan yang diberikan. Doktor dan staf juga baik.

description:
Klinik Pergigian Saidah, situated conveniently in Selangor, stands out for its commitment to oral health care, offering a range of dental services tailored to meet the needs of the local community. The clinic is particularly known for its personalized approach, prioritizing patient comfort during treatments such as preventive care, restorative procedures, and cosmetic dentistry.

The patient journey here is characterized by a welcoming atmosphere and attentive staff, who aim to ease dental anxieties. Despite mixed feedback from patients—some expressing long wait times—many have recognized the dedication of the team and the accessibility of services like routine check-ups and emergency care, essential for oral health maintenance.

Located among bustling commercial areas, Klinik Pergigian Saidah also benefits from excellent public transport links. This accessibility ensures that residents in and around Selangor can easily receive high-quality dental care while fostering a sense of community that encourages regular visits for better oral health.

title: Cheong & Chai Dental Surgery - Petaling Jaya
address: 5A, Jalan 14/20, Seksyen 14, 46100 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ikram
reviews.text:
Great place for scaling 👌🏻.

Doctors and nurses are very kind and polite.

Been here since I was a little boy.

Made an appointment at 9am, Dentist opens exactly on time.

They also sell toothbrushes for people with braces.

reviews.name: Sam of KL
reviews.text:
NOT recommended if you are considering Invisalign.

Went there for a Invisalign. The female dentist was very unprofessional, instead of explain all the unknowns to me as the patient who is paying over RM10,000 for a Invisalign, she just kept asking me to read the menu or look up the internet for answers.

At the finishing phase of the Invisalign, instead of giving me the Invisalign that needs to be ordered from overseas, they charge me extra to make one retainer from them.
and the retainer broke in less than a week.
Keep in mind I still wore it with care yet still, the broke and now my teeth gap are slowly reappearing again.

They seem to be in business for many years, I am guessing this side of the business principle is very inexperience and many other small things I won't bother mentioning such as Dentist is always late, the reception never have a clue about what is going on.

Keep this in mind if you are considering any big treatment here. I do not recommend it personally.

reviews.name: Gunasekaran Kandasamy
reviews.text: Very calmly, patiently and professionally carried out the procedure explaining along the way. Very satisfied with the service. TQVM Dr Cheong🙏🙏🙏

reviews.name: Bell Lee
reviews.text: If you’re afraid of pain or have dental phobia, she’s truly the gentlest dentist I’ve ever met. Not only is she genuine, but also highly professional—other dentists I’ve visited have even complimented the quality of her work on my teeth. We actually found this clinic by chance. My sister was working nearby when she suddenly had severe tooth pain and urgently needed treatment. That’s how she discovered the most gentle and professional dentist in her life. Since then, she introduced her to me and our other sister. Our whole family has been visiting this clinic for years, and we’ve happily recommended it to many of our friends as well.

reviews.name: Karin Cheong
reviews.text:
I fell down and broke my 3 front teeth to almost 80% gone 😭
Can't consume any food or drink, and dare not smile at all☹️😷
Luckily I went to them and save 3 of them. Now I have no worries of laughing and talking bravely😁😄.
Thank you so much for saving making my days shinny again🤗☺️

description:
Located in the bustling area of Petaling Jaya, Cheong & Chai Dental Surgery stands out as a reliable provider of dental care within Malaysia's healthcare scene. Its commitment to patient comfort and clinical excellence fosters a compassionate environment where individuals can receive tailored dental solutions.

Patients often commend the practice for its attentive staff, who are dedicated to ensuring a seamless experience. Feedback highlights their kindness and professionalism during procedures, enhancing overall satisfaction. However, some feedback suggests a need for improvement in specific services like Invisalign treatment, indicating an area for future growth.

Offering a full range of dental services from routine cleanings to advanced procedures, Cheong & Chai integrates effectively with the Petaling Jaya community. Open six days a week, the clinic aims to accommodate diverse schedules while ensuring that each patient feels valued and informed about their care options.

title: JA Dental Surgery
address: 149G, Jalan SS 2/6, SS 2, 47300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: tan ping
reviews.text: ⭐️ Excellent experience! Friendly dentist, modern clinic, painless procedure. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 盈盈廖
reviews.text: All staff are kind and polite. The service is very good.

reviews.name: Zi Hui
reviews.text: good service, staffs and doctors are friendly and professional, helpful.

reviews.name: sandy bozz
reviews.text: Good service🦷👍🏻

reviews.name: Loy Kun
reviews.text: The staffs were kind and prompt. Dentist explained carefully about my conditions and letting me to choose how to proceed, didn't felt like I was pushed towards a choice that benefitted them alone. Proceed to do scaling, x-ray and 3 fillings for a fair and reasonable price. Overall had a great time. Will go here again.

reviews.name: AA Gene
reviews.text: Dr Phoon is very helpful and attentive, fast treatment with reasonable pricing. 11/10 would recommend.

description:

Renowned for its state-of-the-art facilities, this clinic is particularly noted for its expertise in restorative and cosmetic dentistry, appealing to a broad segment of the community seeking high-quality dental care.

The patient journey at JA Dental Surgery is designed with care; individuals are warmly welcomed by a dedicated staff ready to assist. Feedback underscores the professionalism and friendliness of the team—patients appreciate the painless procedures and attentive service, contributing to a reassuring atmosphere throughout their visits.

Conveniently located near key access points in Selangor, the facility is easily reachable for residents in the area. The commitment to enhancing dental health reflects JA Dental Surgery's vital role in community well-being, fostering trust through effective treatment and outstanding care.

reviews.text: Dr Tan是我人生中难得遇见的一位非常专业德行好又充满爱心的牙医❤️非常感恩女儿的介绍🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

Very gentle lady dentist. Skillful,
Patient and give good advice

reviews.name: Alwyn Choy
reviews.text: Congratulations on your 20th Anniversary! Dr. Ling has been taking care of my dental health for almost as long. Thank you!

reviews.name: Pat Lai
reviews.text:
I have been using your dental services for umpteen years, and most recently just two weeks ago to get scaling for my teeth.
I have been under Dr Tan for as long as she has been with the clinic and is very happy with her growing experience.
I am grateful for the annual reminders which pop up in my phone to remind me to take care of my oral health.
Tqvm Doctors and staff 🙏🏻 looking forward to more years of great service.

reviews.name: Y
reviews.text: Their scaling is very detail and gentle~ especially from Dr Tan. Thank you!

title: The Dental Studio
address: 25, Jalan SS 21/34, Damansara Utama, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Carmen Foong
reviews.text: Had a wonderful experience with Dr Wan. She is patient with the kids. Explains all treatment thoroughly. Highly recommended if you are looking for a dentist for your child.

reviews.name: Norsaida Mohd Said
reviews.text: Very professional & friendly Dentist. Gentle with patient & always concern about patient's comfort. Clinic is highly recommended.

reviews.name: Dyan Chitty
reviews.text: Had a great first visit for my child, Dr made my son feel very comfortable during the check up. Will be back again for the next check up

reviews.name: nur adilah
reviews.text: My kids have fun every times see the dentist.doctor so professional handle the kids and they not cry at all

reviews.name: mai
reviews.text:
The doctor was very arrogant and rude, saying things like “If your child doesn’t like it, how can you do the treatment?”
I would never recommend this clinic

I had a very unpleasant experience with this dentist.
The doctor’s attitude was extremely rude, and when I told them how uncomfortable it made me feel, they casually said they would waive the treatment fee. However, I never received any refund, and they completely ignored my messages afterward.
Such disrespectful behavior makes this the worst dental clinic I’ve ever visited

description:
The Dental Studio distinguishes itself in Selangor through a combination of personalized care and advanced dental techniques. Located conveniently in a vibrant neighborhood, the clinic serves as a trusted resource for families seeking quality dental treatment. Its commitment to evidence-based practices sets a standard for oral health within the community.

Patients rave about the warmth and attentiveness of Dr. Wan, particularly her ability to engage with children. Reviews highlight her detailed explanations of procedures, enhancing the overall comfort and understanding for patients—a crucial aspect in pediatric dentistry. Such feedback underscores the facility's strength in fostering an inviting environment that prioritizes patient experiences.

In addition to exceptional service, The Dental Studio features state-of-the-art equipment, ensuring precise diagnostics and treatments. Accessibility is enhanced by its strategic location, with ample parking and proximity to public transport options, making dental visits convenient for all. This balanced approach to exceptional clinical care and patient-centric service underscores The Dental Studio's commitment to excellence in dental health.
